title: Thirst
description: Adds thirst to your server without mods
body: Adds a thirst system to the game, makes it possible to drink water using a bucket of water, a bottle of water, as well as directly from the source with your hand when there are no objects or blocks in it. In normal biomes, you need to drink once every 10 minutes, in hot biomes once every 5 minutes. If a large number of thirst points are lost, the player is given negative effects. When thirst decreases to a critical level, small damage begins to be inflicted.
